com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXConfiguration

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObject

    public interface IXConfiguration
extends IXObject
    Interface providing access to the options and child configurations of a configuration defined in Capital Project.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<IXConfiguration> getChildConfigurations()
      Get the child configurations defined for this configuration.
      java.util.Set<IXOption> getOptions()
      Get the options defined for this configuration.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

    • Method Detail

      • getOptions

        java.util.Set<IXOption> getOptions()
        Get the options defined for this configuration.
        Returns:
        a Set of the options for this configuration if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getChildConfigurations

        java.util.Set<IXConfiguration> getChildConfigurations()
        Get the child configurations defined for this configuration.
        Returns:
        a Set of child configurations for this configuration if any exist, an empty Set otherwise.
